_comment: Data-driven catalog of API-key AI providers for bento-auth. The OAuth device-flow providers (claude, openai-codex) keep their bespoke flows in scripts/bento-auth; everything here is a plain API key that bento-auth stores in state.providers and propagates to every BENTO_MANAGED stack. ADDING A PROVIDER = ONE OBJECT BELOW — no code change. Fields: id (subcommand), label, format ('named' = provider with a dedicated env var the apps recognise built-in, no base URL, coexists with others; 'openai-compat' = custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint that occupies the shared OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_BASE_URL slot, mutually exclusive with other slot occupants incl. Codex), env (where the key is stored), base_url / base_url_env (openai-compat only), signup_url (where to mint a key), validate_url (GET with Bearer to verify the key; empty = skip), note.

providers.label: OpenRouter
providers.note: Universal aggregator — one key, hundreds of models.

providers.label: OpenCode (Zen + Go)
providers.note: One key unlocks BOTH the Zen catalog and the Go subscription; pick models with the opencode/ (Zen) or opencode-go/ (Go) prefix.

providers.label: Google Gemini (API key)
providers.note: Direct API key (Google uses ?key=, not Bearer, so validation is skipped). For the subscription/OAuth tier use the opencode broker (planned).

providers.label: z.ai GLM Coding Plan
providers.note: Cheap GLM coding subscription (~USD 10/mo). Occupies the OpenAI slot.

providers.label: Qwen (DashScope / Model Studio)
providers.note: International (Singapore) endpoint. Occupies the OpenAI slot.
